description: Fixed-grid implied-volatility values across moneyness buckets.
why_included: Core target state and primary term-structure snapshot for forecasting the next IV curve.
Anchors the curve around the most liquid region and captures overall vol regime.

description: First difference of ATM implied volatility.
why_included: Captures short-horizon vol momentum and mean reversion in the central part of the smile.

description: Simple close-to-close or bar-to-bar return of SPY.
why_included: Links IV dynamics to underlying price moves and leverage-effect behavior.
Captures shock magnitude irrespective of direction, useful for vol response.

description: Short-window realized volatility from underlying returns.
why_included: Provides a local realized-vol proxy to compare implied and realized movement.

description: Long-window realized volatility from underlying returns.
why_included: Helps distinguish short-lived bursts from broader volatility regimes.

description: Bar high-low range divided by close.
why_included: Captures intrabar realized movement not fully described by close-to-close returns.
Adds a simple liquidity/activity proxy for intraday information content.
Normalizes participation intensity and highlights unusual trading activity.

description: Difference between left and right edge of the IV curve.
why_included: Compactly encodes skew direction and wing asymmetry.
Captures smile convexity and whether the curve is more U-shaped or flat.
Retains maturity context while keeping the architecture extensible to multiple buckets later.
